//: Compiles the Playwright-driver helpers to CommonJS .js + .d.ts so consumers can require() them from node_modules (Playwright does not transpile .ts inside node_modules). Kept out of the lib's main tsc build (main tsconfig excludes src/playwright). Type-checking is relaxed: the helpers run browser-side code in page.evaluate callbacks that are intentionally untyped, and are already validated at runtime — this step is transpile-oriented.
